notes: Meta-analysis of 25 cohort studies (n=2M+): fish consumption inversely associated with CVD mortality (RR 0.91); marine n-3 PUFA intake reduces CVD mortality (RR 0.87); 4% risk reduction per 20g/day increment
Systematic review and meta-analysis of 38 RCTs (n=149K): omega-3 FAs reduce cardiovascular mortality (RR 0.93), non-fatal MI (RR 0.87), and major adverse cardiovascular events (RR 0.95)
